original_image_tags: A black-and-white photograph of a dark-colored envelope. The envelope is addressed in large, handwritten white capital letters. A circular postmark and a 3-cent U.S. postage stamp are visible in the upper right corner. A smaller, handwritten annotation is in the upper left corner.
A circular postmark stamped over the envelope.
A 3-cent United States Postage stamp featuring a profile portrait, likely of Thomas Jefferson.

elements.description: A photograph of a dark envelope addressed to 'THE CINCINNATI ENQUIRER' in white lettering. It features a circular postmark from 'CINCINNATI, OHIO' dated 'JUL 3, 1952' at '9:30PM', a three-cent United States postage stamp with a portrait of Thomas Jefferson, and wavy cancellation lines. There is also some illegible handwritten text in the upper left corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements (dark envelope, white lettering, circular postmark, 3-cent Jefferson stamp, upper left annotation) but Description B adds specific postmark details (city, date, time) and mentions wavy cancellation lines that A omits, without contradiction.
